name: nRF Sniffer for 802.15.4 (nRF52840 Dongle)
label: nRF Sniffer for 802.15.4 — passive Zigbee/Thread capture
description: nordicsemi/nRF-Sniffer-for-802.15.4 — passive IEEE 802.15.4 / Zigbee / Thread capture into Wireshark (extcap plugin) on the nRF52840 Dongle. Receive-only, no transmit. CC flashes the vendor image via Nordic DFU.
note: Only the DONGLE (PCA10059) is CC-flashable via DFU; the 52840DK/5340DK hex need J-Link/SWD and are EXCLUDED. Firmware is in-tree, releases have empty asset lists -> pinned_release + raw githubusercontent at a PINNED commit. nrf_dfu is EXTENDED: raw .hex -> `nrfutil pkg generate --hw-version 52 --sd-req 0x00 --application <hex>` -> DFU serial flash (chameleon/RNode ship a ready zip; this does not). License NOASSERTION (custom Nordic) -> do NOT re-host the .hex; fetch-from-origin only. app_offset (Nordic docs 0x1000) + SHA + pinned_commit kept verify: until a real dongle flash.
